channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scoop: Netanyahu asks Trump to rein in ErdoÄan ahead of NATO summit
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu complained to President Trump on Friday about Turkish President Recep Tayyip ErdoÄan's escalating anti-Israe...

item.title: Trump contacted FIFA's Infantino regarding Balogun suspension
item.description: President Trump called FIFA President Gianni Infantino about U.S. striker Folarin Balogun's controversial red card and resulting suspension.

item.title: UEFA says FIFA overstepped on Balogun decision
item.description: UEFA stated that FIFA crossed a line by lifting U.S. striker Folarin Balogun's one-match suspension.

item.title: Trump's phone call threatens America's World Cup goodwill
item.description: World Cup fans' enthusiasm for America has waned after FIFA suspended a red-card ban on U.S. striker Folarin Balogun for the match against Belgium.
